remember: Students will be able to define management and explain its various types.
Students will be able to recall the importance of management in an organization.
Students will be able to list down the characteristics of management.
understand: Students will be able to explain the role of management in achieving organizational goals and objectives.
Students will be able to describe the functions of management.
Students will be able to discuss the significance of management in the success of an organization.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of management in a given scenario.
Students will be able to analyze the role of management in a specific industry or organization.
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast different management styles and their impact on an organization.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of management in achieving organizational goals.

ncert_objectives: Define management and explain its importance in an organization.
Explain the role of management in achieving organizational goals and objectives.
Discuss the different types of management and their characteristics.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the nature and significance of management.
Define management and its importance in an organization.
Discuss the functions of management and their role in achieving organizational goals.
